title: Your AI Agent Is Missing Half the Internet… Until Now (Agent-Reach)
summary: Agent-Reach is an open source tool that gives AI agents access to real internet context across Western platforms like Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, and GitHub as well as Chinese platforms like Bilibili and Xiaohongshu. It solves the problem of coding agents breaking when they need social feedback, discussions, tutorials, or non-English research from the internet.
writeup: The video introduces Agent-Reach, an open source tool that supplies AI agents with real internet context from Western platforms (Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, and GitHub) and Chinese platforms (Bilibili and Xiaohongshu). It addresses a specific failure mode: coding agents that break when they need social feedback, discussions, tutorials, or non-English research that lives on these sites. The takeaway is a single integration that broadens agent access beyond English sources and beyond the platforms most tools already cover.
